properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 C2 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Here we are at the start committing to each other By His word and from our hearts We will be a family in a house that will be a home And with faith we'll build it strong

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: We'll build a household of faith That together we can make And when the strong winds blow it won't fall down As one in Him we'll grow and the whole world will know That we are a household of faith

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Now to be a family we've got to love each other At any cost unselfishly And our home must be a place that truly abound with grace A reflection of His face
